LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD PH.D. P.E.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND (PROPOSED) CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION PROVISION IS REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
